sceneName: 初中历史人物评价导师
title: batch-初中历史人物评价导师-002
initialPrompt: 请开始这次单场景教学问答。

metadata.scene: 初中历史人物评价导师

studentInitialQuestion: I'm BellQuinn, I'm 14 and in 8th grade. I do competitive dance and love baking, so I like things to be lively and creative. When we talk about historical figures in class, like Empress Wu Zetian, I get excited about debates but find it hard to quickly decide what's good or bad about them. Can you simply say how I can look at both the achievements and mistakes of someone like Wu Zetian? Simple say it so I can get the main idea fast.
